'''Ra'tre''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] who along with [[Ark'ik]], were running [[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna]] for [[Sligh]], [[Grees]] and [[Emala]] to [[Tenupe]].
